inputs.label: Upstream Mach Number (M1)
inputs.businessContext: Mach number before the expansion fan

inputs.label: Specific Heat Ratio (γ)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of specific heats for the gas (e.g., 1.4 for air)

inputs.label: Flow Deflection Angle (θ)
inputs.businessContext: Angle through which the flow is turned (positive for expansion)

formulas.mach2: let f = (mach) => Math.sqrt((gamma+1)/(gamma-1))*Math.atan(Math.sqrt((gamma-1)/(gamma+1)*(mach**2-1)))-Math.atan(Math.sqrt(mach**2-1)); let target = f(mach1) + deflectionAngle * Math.PI / 180; let low = 1.001, high = 100, mid; for(let i=0;i<100;i++){ mid=(low+high)/2; if(f(mid)<target) low=mid; else high=mid; } return mid;
